case_title: DE LA ROSA, AL JEZREEL vs. COURET, SUZANNE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA ROSA, AL JEZREEL AS TO DEFENDANT COURET, SUZANNE PETERSON, OSCAR DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-20-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-02-2000

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON SEP-26-2000, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY BRUCE J. LEVITZ., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-11-2000 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA ROSA, AL JEZREEL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY LEVITZ BRUCE. HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY BRUCE J LEVITZ. HEARING SET FOR FEB-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
